title: Copy cell1 to cell2 when cell1 changes
excerpt: I would like to update 2 cells with the same value. I would like to update 1 cell and an otomation will set the other cell to the same value. I need it for expected & actual expense

posts.author: Yoel (Elia Barkai)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to update 2 cells with the same value. I would like to update 1 cell and an otomation will set the other cell to the same value. I need it for expected & actual expense

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Yoel!

Whilst it isn’t an automated process, it is possible to utilise batch actions to make bulk changes across cells as a workaround?
